chunks.text: Technical Reports - Rikky Muller. Towards a Wireless Fluorescence Microscope on A Chip (EECS-2025-31) Rozhan Rabbani.
chunks.question: What is the title of the technical report by Rozhan Rabbani?
chunks.answer: Towards a Wireless Fluorescence Microscope on A Chip.

chunks.text: High-Performance Bio-sensing ICs (EECS-2025-15) Sina Faraji Alamouti and Rikky Muller.
chunks.question: Who are the authors of the bio-sensing ICs report?
chunks.answer: Sina Faraji Alamouti and Rikky Muller.
